text: ha to mara order vishe bolu chu kal thi koi update nathi aavi ane delivery boy pan call nathi karto
voice note ma address kidhu hatu pan parcel biji society ma muki gaya hoy em lage chhe
mne refund kyare aavse e j samajhatu nathi karan ke paisa cut thai gaya pan order confirm nathi thayu
tamne gate number ane landmark be vakhat kahyu hatu pan pickup vala ne maliyu nathi
aa replacement ni jagyae simple refund joiye chhe hu fari thi same item nahi mangavu
mara wallet mathi paisa gaya pachi app freeze thai gayu ane payment success batavyu pan order dekhatu nathi
kyc ma je photo mokli hati e clear hati pan tame blur kahi ne reject kari didhu
support e kidhu hatu ke 24 kalak ma callback aavse pan have tran divas thai gaya
mara order ma ek item ochho aavyo chhe ane invoice ma pan be item j chhe tame check karo
aa chat export joi ne tamne khabar padi jashe ke hu kal pan same complaint kari hati
delivery reschedule karvi hati savare thi sanje sudhi koi pan slot chale pan confirm karo
bank account verify thai gayu chhata payout hold ma chhe e vishe clear bolo
otp be tran vakhat try kari lidhu pan mane code malto j nathi ane session expire thai jay chhe
seller sathe je vaat thai hati eno screenshot pan moklyo chhe to exchange approve thavu joiye ne
parcel warehouse sudhi pohchi gayu pachi koi movement nathi dekhatu etle chinta thai rahi chhe
mari subscription auto renew band karvi chhe pan settings ma option j nathi dekhatu
cash memo joiye chhe karan ke reimbursement mate office ma submit karvu chhe jaldi moklo
group ma je support number moklyo hato e par koi phone uthadvatu nathi to bijo number aapo
tamaro promo code minimum spend vagar pan kaam karvo joiye hatu pan cart ma apply nathi thato
old item collect karva pehla replacement dispatch kari do to mane problem thase nahi
pickup boy aavyo hato pan kehva lagyo ke address adhuro chhe jyare hu badhu voice note ma kahi didhu hatu
same amount be vakhat debit thayu chhe ane bank statement ma banne entry dekhay chhe
tamne document physical submit karva padse em kidhu pan nearest branch kyare open hoy e pan bolo
return pickup aaje na thai to kale savare kari do pan koi final msg moklo
mne lage chhe app ma bug chhe karan ke payment page khule etle crash thai jay chhe
aa damaged parcel ni photo ane unboxing video beu mari pase chhe jo joiye to mokli dau
landmark gate number floor badhu kahi didhu pachi pan delivery boy bolyo location nathi mali
invoice ma gst number nathi dekhatu etle accounts team accept karti nathi tame updated copy moklo
refund initiated batave chhe pan sms ke mail kai pan nathi aavyu etle doubt chhe
voice note sambhlo to puro context mali jashe hu message ma badhu lakhine samjavi nathi shakta
haan main order ke bare me bol raha hu kal se koi update nahi aayi aur delivery boy bhi call nahi kar raha
voice note me address bola tha phir bhi parcel kisi aur building me chhod diya gaya lag raha hai
mujhe refund kab milega ye samajh nahi aa raha kyunki paise cut ho gaye par order confirm nahi hua
gate number aur landmark dono bataya tha fir bhi pickup wala ghar tak nahi pahucha
exchange nahi simple refund chahiye kyunki main same item dubara nahi mangwana chahta
wallet se paise katne ke baad app hang ho gaya aur payment success dikha raha tha par order nahi bana
kyc ke liye jo photo bheji thi wo clear thi phir bhi aapne blur bolkar reject kar diya
support ne bola tha 24 ghante me callback aayega lekin ab teen din ho gaye
mere order me ek item kam aaya hai aur invoice me bhi do hi item dikh rahe hain
ye chat export dekhoge to samajh aa jayega ki maine kal bhi same complaint ki thi
delivery reschedule karni hai subah se shaam tak koi bhi slot chalega bas confirm kar dijiye
bank account verify ho gaya phir bhi payout hold me hai iske bare me clear bataiye
otp do teen baar try kar liya par mujhe code mil hi nahi raha aur session expire ho jata hai
seller ke saath jo baat hui thi uska screenshot bhi bheja hai to exchange approve hona chahiye
parcel warehouse tak pahunch gaya uske baad koi movement nahi dikh rahi isliye tension ho rahi hai
meri subscription auto renew band karni hai par settings me option hi nahi dikh raha
cash memo chahiye kyunki reimbursement ke liye office me submit karna hai jaldi bhejiye
group me jo support number bheja tha us par koi phone nahi utha raha to dusra number dijiye
promo code minimum spend ke bina bhi chalna chahiye tha par cart me apply nahi ho raha
old item collect karne se pehle replacement dispatch kar do to mujhe dikkat nahi hogi
pickup boy aaya tha par bol raha tha address incomplete hai jabki maine sab voice note me bola tha
same amount do baar debit hua hai aur bank statement me dono entries dikh rahi hain
aap bol rahe ho document branch me submit karo par nearest branch kab khulti hai wo bhi batao
return pickup aaj nahi ho sakta to kal subah kar do par final message bhejo
mujhe lag raha hai app me bug hai kyunki payment page khulte hi crash ho jata hai
damaged parcel ki photo aur unboxing video dono mere paas hain dekhna ho to bhej deta hu
landmark gate number floor sab bataya phir bhi delivery boy bol raha tha location nahi mili
invoice me gst number nahi dikh raha isliye accounts team accept nahi kar rahi updated copy bhejo
refund initiated dikha raha hai par na sms aaya na mail isliye doubt ho raha hai
voice note sun lo to pura context mil jayega message me sab likhkar samjhana mushkil hai
